page_name.description: The name of the current page. Agent can get this from pages.page_name in the flow JSON.

account_type.description: Real account or Demo account. This can be set after user logged in to the app. Need to read the value from the app during running the project.

user_language.description: Need to read this from the selected language in the app in the runtime.

country_of_residence.description: User's selected country of residence. Need to read it from app.

is_profile_completed.description: Is the state of real account creation. If user completed the account creation it is true else false. Need to read it from app.

project_name.description: Hardcoded value for the app. Defined when setting up event_metadata.
